macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Reach $94.5 Million in Past 24 Hours
items.summary: A total of $94.5229 million in cryptocurrency futures contracts were liquidated network-wide, with $43.37 million in long positions and $51.16 million in shorts; BTC liquidations hit $11.66 million and ETH $14.67 million.

items.title: Bitcoin Price Breaks Above $78,000 Amid U.S.-Iran Peace Proposal Optimism
items.summary: Bitcoin rallied past the $78,000 psychological level following Iran's new proposal to end the war against the U.S., boosting market sentiment.

items.title: $2.1 Billion in Bitcoin and Ethereum Options Set to Expire Today
items.summary: Major crypto market selloffs are anticipated as $2.1 billion in BTC and ETH options expire, potentially increasing volatility amid uncertainties.

items.title: Senator Tillis Releases CLARITY Act Stablecoin Yield Text Ahead of Senate Markup
items.summary: Senator Thom Tillis revealed the stablecoin yield provisions of the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act, signaling an imminent Senate Banking Committee markup.

items.title: Dormant Ethereum Wallets Drained in Suspected Mass Hack
items.summary: Hundreds of long-inactive Ethereum wallets were swept to a single tagged address, with debates ongoing over causes like old keys or wallet vulnerabilities.

items.title: Tom Lee’s Bitmine Purchases 10,000 ETH from Ethereum Foundation
items.summary: Bitmine Immersion Technologies acquired 10,000 ETH directly from the Ethereum Foundation, leading to a climb in its BMNR stock.

items.title: Pi Network to Upgrade to Protocol 23 by May 15, Introducing Smart Contracts
items.summary: Pi Network plans a mainnet upgrade by May 15 to Protocol 23, enabling smart contracts and advancing its blockchain capabilities.

items.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Drops 2.3% to 132.47 T
items.summary: Bitcoin's mining difficulty decreased by 2.3% to 132.47 trillion, reflecting adjustments in network hashrate.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Astronomers Deploy AI Tool RAVEN to Discover Over 100 Hidden Exoplanets in NASA TESS Data
items.summary: A new AI pipeline called RAVEN analyzed NASA's TESS mission data, confirming 118 new planets including 31 entirely new worlds and over 2,000 candidates, with discoveries of ultra-short-period planets and those in the 'Neptunian desert.' The tool identified rare extreme planets and multi-planet systems for future study.

items.title: Anthropic Eyes Massive $900B+ Valuation in New Funding Round Amid AI Startup Boom
items.summary: Anthropic is considering a funding round that could value it above $900 billion, surpassing OpenAI, fueled by strategic deals with Google ($40B) and Amazon ($25B) for compute and cloud partnerships. This reflects competition in building industrial AI stacks including models, cloud, and enterprise platforms.

items.title: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, a Multimodal Long-Context Model for Agentic Tasks
items.summary: NVIDIA launched Nemotron 3 Nano Omni Model, optimized for multimodal inputs and long-context processing in agentic AI applications. This release highlights ongoing advancements in efficient, task-specific AI models.

items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Security Beta for Enterprise Vulnerability Scanning
items.summary: Anthropic introduced Claude Security in beta, enhancing its enterprise offerings with AI-focused security vulnerability detection. This addition targets security needs in AI-driven business environments.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Bomberman Online Restored for Dreamcast After 23 Years
items.summary: Bomberman Online for Dreamcast is now playable online again thanks to developers flyinghead and Farkus, restoring full multiplayer functionality for up to 8 players after a 23-year server outage.

items.title: World of Warcraft Patch 12.0.7 Announced with New Content
items.summary: Blizzard has announced Patch 12.0.7 for World of Warcraft, introducing Turbulent Timeways, a one-boss raid featuring the fungal giant Rottme, new worlds, and an Omnium Folio, following the recent 12.0.5 rollout.

items.title: Surprise Restocks of Pokémon TCG Sets at Pokémon Center
items.summary: The Pokémon Center has surprise restocked popular TCG sets Ascended Heroes and Phantasmal Flames, providing a second chance for collectors who missed the initial release.

items.title: Bleach Soul Resonance Shares Half-Anniversary News Roundup
items.summary: The latest news roundup for Bleach Soul Resonance covers half-anniversary updates, including discussions on farming core stamp keys and F2P limitations.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Top Boston Dynamics Executives Depart Amid Pressure for Humanoid Robots
items.summary: Several top executives at Hyundai-owned Boston Dynamics have left in recent months as the company faces pressure to accelerate delivery of humanoid robots.

items.title: Palo Alto Networks Acquires AI Gateway Startup Portkey for $120M-$140M
items.summary: Palo Alto Networks has agreed to buy Portkey, a developer of AI gateway technology for managing and securing AI agents, in a deal valuing the company at $120M-$140M.

items.title: cPanel Critical Flaw CVE-2026-41940 Mass-Exploited in 'Sorry' Ransomware Attacks
items.summary: A newly disclosed cPanel vulnerability is being widely exploited by attackers to breach websites and deploy 'Sorry' ransomware for data encryption.

items.title: Microsoft Tests Modern Windows Run Dialog with Dark Mode and Faster Performance
items.summary: Microsoft is previewing a redesigned Run dialog for Windows 11 featuring dark mode support and improved speed over the legacy version.

items.title: Meta Acquires Robotics AI Startup Assured Robot Intelligence
items.summary: Meta has purchased Assured Robot Intelligence to bolster its push into humanoid machines, with the startup's staff joining Meta's Superintelligence Labs.

items.title: Microsoft's Xbox Mode Rolls Out to Windows 11 PCs
items.summary: Xbox mode, providing a console-like interface, is beginning to appear on Windows 11 PCs.

items.title: Nissan Abandons Plans for US EV Plant Producing 200,000 Vehicles Yearly
items.summary: Nissan has scrapped its proposed US electric vehicle factory that was set to produce 200,000 EVs annually.

items.title: Toilet Maker Toto Pledges Investment in NAND Memory Ceramics Amid RAM Crisis
items.summary: Toto, known for toilets, will increase investment in its ceramics division used in NAND memory production to address the ongoing RAM shortage.

items.title: Edu Tech Firm Instructure Discloses Cybersecurity Incident
items.summary: Instructure, maker of the Canvas learning platform, revealed a recent cyber incident and is investigating its impact.

items.title: ConsentFix v3 Attacks Target Azure with Automated OAuth Abuse
items.summary: A new automated attack variant, ConsentFix v3, is spreading on hacker forums, enhancing previous OAuth abuse techniques for scaling against Azure.
